summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five maintainer-ready PRs. No GitHub mutations are planned because the job blocks comment/close actions and no PR has complete merge preflight proof, including a clean Codex /review with findings addressed. Three PRs have concrete maintainer-safe repair paths, one PR needs product/maintainer judgment before implementation, and one uneditable contributor branch should be replaced with credited follow-up work.

actions.reason: Useful focused PR, but failing proof and unresolved review proof block merge.
Bootstrap tier semantics are product-facing and need maintainer judgment before merge or automation-owned rewrite.
Useful Slack parity PR, but failing proof plus unresolved bot-review blockers require repair before merge.
Likely close to merge, but merge policy blocks without clean /review and merge_preflight evidence.
Useful uneditable contributor PR with a concrete narrow fix path, but failing proof and missing merge preflight block merge.

needs_human: #22439 needs maintainer/product decision on bootstrapTier semantics and compatibility before automation should merge or rewrite it.
#88757 remains broader than the #93580 cron-awareness subset and carries hydrated needs-product-decision context.
